steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content:
The system states that $y=35$. Substitute this into the other equation.
$$35=10x-15$$

steps.title: Solve for the coordinate
steps.content:
Add $15$ to both sides, then divide by $10$.
$$50=10x$$
$$x=5$$
The solution is $(5,35)$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Graph the two equations and read their intersection point.
The answer is A.
